survFMM 0.1.0
  • Reference

Reference

All functions

clean_subgroup_labels()

Clean subgroup labels for survFMM objects A common problem in finite mixture modeling is that subgroup labels are superficial, e.g., the group labeled 'subgroup 1' does not always correspond to the subgroup with the smallest treatment effect. The purpose of this function is to update subgroup labels in order of increasing magnitude of the treatment term such that subgroup 1 always has the smallest treatment term and subgroup 2 always has the largest treatment estimate.

custom_name_repair()

Custom Name Repair

fmm_em_algorithm()

EM Algorithm for Finite Mixture Models with Survival Endpoints

initialize_starting_values()

Initialize starting values for each initial partition of the EM algorithm call

joint_test()

Joint Test via Contrast Statement

log_likelihood_with_censoring()

Log-likelihood computation for use within the survFMM function

sim_data

Simulated Dataset

survFMM()

Fit a finite mixture model for survival endpoints
